title: Solid state forms of fedovapagon-salicyclic acid co-crystal
abstract: The present disclosure relates to co-crystals of Fedovapagon, processes for preparation thereof as well as a pharmaceutical composition including the same.
claims: Claims Claims: 1. Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal. 2. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to Claim 1, designated form beta, having data selected from one or more of the following: a. a PXRD pattern having peaks at 8.7, 10.2, 16.0, 20.6 and 23.2 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; b. a PXRD pattern as depicted in Figure 2; c. a 13 C solid state NMR having peaks at at the range of 100-200 ppm at 172.6, 162.2, 127.8, 125.0, 116.7 ppm Â± 0.2 ppm; d. a solid state 13 C NMR spectrum having the following chemical shift absolute differences from a reference peak at 57.6 Â± 0.2 ppm ppm Â± 2 ppm of 115.0, 104.6, 70.2, 67.4, 59.1 Â± 0.1 ppm respectively; e. a 13 C solid state NMR spectrum substantially as depicted in Figure 5; and f. combinations of these data. 3. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form beta according to Claim 1 or Claim 2, characterized by the PXRD pattern having peaks at 8.7, 10.2, 16.0, 20.6 and 23.2 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta, and also having one, two, three, four or five additional peaks at 5.1, 8.0, 19.4, 25.7 and 30.3 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta. 4. Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form beta according any of Claims 1 to 3, which is an anhydrous form. 5. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any one of Claims 1-4, wherein the molar ratio of Fedovapagon and salicylic acid is between about 1 : 1.5 and 1.5: 1. 6. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any one of Claims 1-5, wherein the molar ratio of Fedovapagon and salicylic acid is between about 1 : 1.25 and 1.25: 1. 7. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any one of Claims 1-6, wherein the molar ratio of Fedovapagon and salicylic acid is about 1 : 1. 8. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to Claim 1, designated form gamma, having data selected from one or more of the following: a. a PXRD pattern having peaks at 11.0, 17.2, 18.5, 19.2 and 23.0 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta, and optionally a PXRD pattern as depicted in Figure 3; b. a PXRD pattern having peaks at 7.2, 17.2, 18.5, 19.2 and 23.0 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta, and optionally a PXRD pattern as depicted in Figure 4. 9. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form gamma according to Claim 8, characterized by the PXRD pattern having peaks at 11.0, 17.2, 18.5, 19.2 and 23.0 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta or a PXRD pattern having peaks at 7.2, 17.2, 18.5, 19.2 and 23.0 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta, and also having one, two, three, four or five additional peaks at 14.7, 11.8, 15.4, 28.8 and 34.7 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2- theta. 10. Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form gamma according Claim 8 or Claim 9, which is an anhydrous form. 11. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any one of Claims 8-10, wherein the molar ratio of Fedovapagon and salicylic acid is between about 1 : 1.33 to 1 :2.5. 12. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any one of Claims 8-11, wherein the molar ratio of Fedovapagon and salicylic acid is between about 1 : 1.6 to 1 :2.5. 13. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any one of Claims 8-12, wherein the molar ratio of Fedovapagon and salicylic acid is about 1 :2. 14. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any preceding claim, which contains: no more than about 20%, no more than about 10%, no more than about 5%, no more than about 2%, no more than about 1% or about 0% of any other Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form. 15. A Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal according to any preceding claim, which contains: no more than about 20%, no more than about 10%, no more than about 5%, no more than about 2%, no more than about 1% or about 0% of any other crystalline form of Fedovapagon. 16. A pharmaceutical composition comprising any one or a combination of Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any of Claims 1-15. 17. Use of any one or a combination of Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any one of Claims 1 to 15 for the preparation of a pharmaceutical composition and/or oral formulation, preferably wherein the pharmaceutical formulation is an oral formulation. 18. A pharmaceutical formulation comprising any one or a combination of Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any of Claims 1-15, or a pharmaceutical composition of Claim 16, and at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 19. A process for preparing the pharmaceutical formulation according to Claim 18, comprising combining any one or a combination of Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co crystal form according to any one of Claims 1-15 or a pharmaceutical composition of Claim 16, with at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 20. Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any one of Claims 2-6 or Claims 8-12 or Claims 14-15, a pharmaceutical composition according to Claim 16, or a pharmaceutical formulation according to Claim 18, for use as a medicament. 21. Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any of Claims 1-15, a pharmaceutical composition according to Claim 16, or a pharmaceutical formulation according to Claim 18, for use in the treatment of Nocturia. 22. A method of treating Nocturia, comprising administering a therapeutically effective amount of Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any of Claims 1-15, or a pharmaceutical composition according to Claim 16, or a pharmaceutical formulation according to Claim 18 to a subject in need of the treatment. 23. Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any of Claims 1-15, a pharmaceutical composition according to Claim 16, or a pharmaceutical formulation according to Claim 18, for the manufacture of a medicament for treatment of Nocturia. 24. Use of Fedovapagon: salicylic acid co-crystal form according to any of Claims 1-15, in the preparation of another solid state form of Fedovapagon, or salts and co-crystals of Fedovapagon and solid state forms thereof.
